steps.title: Identify the structures
steps.content: Before the blank we have the prepositional phrase “trouble in the ______” inside the quoted definition. After the blank the quotation ends and the sentence continues with the participial phrase “positing that all life’s virtues derived from this absence.”

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content: The rule is: after a quoted expression that is followed by a supplementing participial phrase, place a comma after the closing quotation mark and keep the participle lowercase. Choice A provides the closing quote, a comma, and lowercase positing. The other three either misuse punctuation or capitalization. That matches choice A — A is correct.
